scenes.title: Cover: The Opportunity Ranked
scenes.narration: Not every business is equally easy to sell a creative-video package to. The category you choose changes everything, from how fast you close to how smoothly you deliver.
scenes.visual_prompt: Deep obsidian background with a subtle radial glow in dark gold at center. Centered composition: a large, elegant number-one medal icon rendered in glowing amber line-art floats above a horizontal stage plane. Below the icon, a clean bold headline zone is left clear for overlay text. Rich atmospheric depth haze, very slight particle drift, premium editorial finish. No readable body copy rendered into the image.
scenes.staging_notes: Title entrance: headline fades in first, subtitle rises from below. Hold on the glowing medal hero for 2-3 seconds before transitioning.
on_screen_text: Which business categories win every time

scenes.title: The Two-Variable Filter
scenes.narration: Two things separate a great target category from a frustrating one: how easy it is to sell, and how easy it is to fulfill. The best categories score high on both.
scenes.visual_prompt: Dark charcoal background. A clean two-axis grid materialises: horizontal axis labelled 'Ease of Sale,' vertical axis labelled 'Ease of Fulfillment.' Both axes glow in cool blue-white. A scatter-plot region glows gold in the upper-right quadrant, implying the sweet spot. Motion-first beat with axes drawing in sequentially.
scenes.staging_notes: Axes draw in one at a time left-to-right, then top-to-bottom. The upper-right quadrant pulses gold on the word 'both' in narration. Keep frame minimal and spare.
on_screen_text: The sweet spot: high on both

scenes.title: The Ranked Stage Reveal
scenes.narration: Here are the strongest categories, ranked from best to strongest opportunity. Each one has a proven need, a clear story, and a buyer who already values great video.
scenes.visual_prompt: Deep navy-to-black gradient background. A vertical ranked list animates in from top to bottom, each row a glowing panel with a rank number on the left in bold amber and a category name in clean white type. Six rows total, spaced evenly, with subtle horizontal glow lines separating each entry. Premium data-theatre aesthetic, no clutter.
scenes.staging_notes: Rows stagger in one by one with a 0.3-second delay each. Rank numbers glow amber on entry. Hold the full list for 2 seconds before transitioning.
on_screen_text: Top Business Categories for Creative Video

scenes.title: #1 — Real Estate
scenes.narration: Real estate sits at the top for good reason. Agents need constant fresh content, listings have built-in visual stories, and the ROI of a great property video is immediately obvious to the buyer.
scenes.visual_prompt: Dark premium background with a deep charcoal-to-midnight-blue gradient. Left half: an elegantly lit luxury home exterior, rendered in warm golden light against a dusk sky, photorealistic mood. Right half: a clean dark panel with ample space for overlay text. Subtle gold border framing the left image panel. Cinematic depth of field, refined editorial finish. No readable text rendered into the image.
scenes.staging_notes: Rank badge '#1' appears first in amber, then category name, then the two proof-point lines fade in below. Clean staggered reveal.

scenes.title: #2 — Restaurants & Food
scenes.narration: Restaurants live and die on appetite appeal. A short, beautifully shot food video drives reservations and social engagement, and the shoot itself is fast, repeatable, and fun to produce.
scenes.visual_prompt: Dark moody restaurant interior ambiance as background: deep burgundy and charcoal tones, bokeh candlelight. Center: a hero close-up of a glistening, beautifully plated dish on a dark stone surface, dramatically lit from above with a soft golden key light. Right side: dark panel reserved for overlay. Rich cinematic food-photography feel, deep shadows and warm highlights. No readable text in image.
scenes.staging_notes: Category rank and title animate in first, then the two callouts fade in with a short delay.

scenes.title: #3 — Fitness & Wellness
scenes.narration: Fitness studios are selling transformation. Before-and-after energy, instructor personality, and the vibe of the space are all things video captures better than any other medium.
scenes.visual_prompt: Dark slate-grey and deep teal background. Center-left: a dramatic wide shot of a modern fitness studio interior, dynamic lighting with dramatic shafts of light cutting through a darkened space, empty but energetic — rows of equipment receding in perspective. Right panel: dark surface for overlay text. Subtle electric-blue rim lighting on equipment edges. Cinematic, aspirational, athletic mood. No text in image.
scenes.staging_notes: Rank badge animates in amber, title follows, then two callout lines stagger in. Light energy feel.

scenes.title: #4 — Med Spas & Beauty
scenes.narration: Med spas and beauty clinics are premium-priced services with high lifetime client value. They need trust-building content, and a polished video delivers exactly that.
scenes.visual_prompt: Ultra-clean, luxurious background: deep cream-white marble texture fading to soft charcoal grey at the edges. Center: a pristine modern med-spa treatment room corner — a minimalist white leather chair, a single orchid in a clear vase, soft diffused ambient lighting. Right panel: dark overlay zone. Soft warm highlights, clinical but indulgent, premium beauty-brand aesthetic. No text rendered in image.
scenes.staging_notes: Title and callouts reveal in sequence. Keep the pacing gentle to match the premium beauty tone.

scenes.title: #5 — Auto Dealerships
scenes.narration: Auto dealerships have high ticket values and competitive pressure. A sharp walkaround video or a dealership brand spot earns its budget back fast, and they often want a series, not just one.
scenes.visual_prompt: Dark showroom environment background: polished obsidian floor reflecting dramatic overhead track lighting. Center: a sleek modern sedan bathed in a focused white-gold spotlight, glossy paint reflecting environmental light, luxury automotive photography style. Right panel: dark surface for overlay text. Deep contrast, cinematic automotive-ad feel, rich blacks and silver highlights. No text in image.
scenes.staging_notes: Rank badge enters first, then title, then two callout lines. Slightly faster reveal pace than the beauty scene.

scenes.title: #6 — Local Events & Entertainment
scenes.narration: Local events and entertainment venues need hype content before the event and recap content after. That's a built-in two-shot deal every single time.
scenes.visual_prompt: Dark atmospheric background: deep indigo-to-black gradient with soft bokeh light scatter suggesting a crowd or venue in the background. Center-left: a dynamic wide shot of a lit event stage, dramatic colored wash lights in deep purple and gold cutting through haze, empty stage implying anticipation. Right panel: dark overlay zone. Electrifying, cinematic live-event mood, rich light scatter. No text in image.
scenes.staging_notes: Rank badge and title enter, then two callout lines. The 'two-shot deal' line can have a subtle pulse to emphasize the value point.

scenes.title: What the Best Share
scenes.narration: Every category at the top of this list shares three things: a visual product, a motivated buyer, and a deliverable you can produce efficiently.
scenes.visual_prompt: Dark premium background, deep charcoal. Three equally spaced horizontal rows animate in, each with a bold icon on the left: a camera lens, a dollar-sign badge, and a checkmark gear. Each row has a short label to its right. Clean, sparse, data-theatre aesthetic with warm amber accent on each icon.
scenes.staging_notes: Three rows stagger in one at a time, each triggered by a short delay. Icons animate in with a subtle glow pop. Hold the full frame for 2 seconds.

scenes.title: The Decision Frame
scenes.narration: Use this ranking as a targeting filter, not just a curiosity. Start at the top, work your way down, and double down on whatever category closes fastest in your market.
scenes.visual_prompt: Deep navy background. A bold centered statement zone with a large glowing amber arrow pointing downward from a ranked list icon toward a target-circle icon at the bottom. The composition feels purposeful and directional, like a strategy map. Minimal, decisive, premium feel.
scenes.staging_notes: Text lines reveal one at a time in sync with narration beats. The downward arrow draws in after 'Start at the top.' Keep the motion confident and deliberate, not flashy.
on_screen_text: Use the ranking as your targeting filter
Double down on what closes fastest

scenes.title: Closing: Your First Target
scenes.narration: The ranked list is your starting point. Pick the category that fits your market, lead with a sharp offer, and let the video do the rest. The opportunity is clear — now it's yours to take.
scenes.visual_prompt: Dark obsidian background with a deep centered radial glow in warm gold, soft and atmospheric. Center: a single bold amber number-one icon, large and luminous, casting a faint halo of light onto the dark stage plane below it. Below the icon, ample space for overlay text. Premium, resolved, decisive mood. Cinematic stillness. No text rendered in image.
scenes.staging_notes: The three closing lines appear one at a time in slow, confident stagger. Final frame holds for 3 seconds. Fade out to black.
on_screen_text: Let the video do the rest.
